html: Received the Academic Excellence Award for the spring semester. (I hope it's true🥲)
Finished my cryptography engineering final project — a from-scratch implementation of an authenticated-encryption scheme.
Built a simple x86-64 assembler as a side project during winter break.
Joined a research group as an undergraduate assistant, working on systems-adjacent problems.
Received a merit scholarship for academic performance in the 2024–25 academic year.
